description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure dressed in cozy, casual loungewear. She wears a long-sleeved sweater featuring a large gingerbread man motif on the front, paired with patterned pajama pants adorned with whimsical designs. Her feet are covered by plush animal slippers, adding a playful touch to her attire. The figure has shoulder-length, straight hair and a neutral facial expression. Her arms are relaxed at her sides, and her overall build is average. The clothing and accessories suggest a relaxed, homey vibe suitable for informal urban or residential settings.
description: A casually dressed adult woman in a gingerbread sweater, patterned pajama pants, and plush animal slippers, with shoulder-length straight hair and a relaxed stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gingerbread motif sweater, patterned pajama pants, and animal slippers, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the sweater, pants, and slippers, with the hair falling straight down.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sweater and pants, and the back of the slippers and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the figure, similar to the left but mirrored.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved sweater with a motif, patterned pajama pants, and plush animal slippers
